title: fabisblog
description: A minimal hugo theme focus on content

items.title: Why 20 Bucks Should Not Bother You
items.content_text:
PART 1
Some days ago, I went to a store. I was browsing through the products, talking to the cashier, and so on. After I decided what to buy, the cashier reached under his desk and got me that package of something. I was really happy.
Arriving home, eager to open up the product, I realized the package was empty.
IT WAS EMPTY. Filled with air. Not even hot.
I looked at the price. €19,50. I checked inside the little carton again.
After considering and being sure nobody else has opened it, of course anyways I asked my mates if they did.
The answer was no.
FUCK. I could have spend this money on something else. Something stupid at least. ONLY because of this really stupid cashier. I hope he bumps his little toe very hard at his bed taking a piss at 355 in the morning.
Well, not really.
PART 2
Next day driving home in the car, I had a realization. A realization I am really damn proud of and happy about. It’s about being aware even about the little things, isn’t it? Because they add up so quickly and make a HUGE impact in our life.
Well, I though that these 20 bucks really should not bother me. Not at all. Who am I to be thinking about peanuts? When I keep getting emotional about a small amount like this, how can I ever reach the riches? When I keep thinking about peanuts, how can I ever get the nice and fat coconuts? Or the fucking gold, let’s put it this way if you’re not into coconuts.
If you have a sense for the law of attraction, you are already seeing clearly what I wanna get across. I admire you.
The point is, that we cannot reach the mountain if we are still digging in the grass.
I happily let go of that money, furthermore, I am really happy about what I have spent on this weekend trip. I am grateful for the money that came my way, the money I have earned working hard, and now I am super happy to spend it on me and my friends. I know that more money and riches are coming to manifest in my life, I am absolutely sure of that. I know what I am capable of. I know what I have already done. I know that I can make a fortune if I wish, and that If I continue to keep working hard (in all senses, mentally, physically), care will be taken off me well. I am very well off in life. I give and spend my money, because I know that I am making sure that it is also coming my way. I do not begrudge where my money goes.
Something like that.
I believe that if we are stingy, we will never have too much. If we got the feeling of not having enough, we will never get past this point. Life is always rendering around our emotional set point.
PART 3
I have not even for a second thought that the cashier has sold me the empty package on purpose. EVEN IF HE HAD, I would not allow that feeling of betrayal get on me. Of course, If I kew he did, I would have never shaken hands again and I would take care making sure he stays the fuck out of my life. But not a second do I spend holding that negative energy inside of myself, and I CONTINUE TO TRUST. Not because I am naive, BECAUSE I GOT THE COURAGE.
Having travelled many, many dozens of places, trusting hundreds of people, not really one has fucked me over yet. NOT ONE. Why? Because I give trust first.
If you give trust, love, and appreciation, why in hell should anybody fuck you over? 99 out of 100 would not. And I bet you can recognize the one and walk away actively.
If I see somebody talking about how you can never trust nobody… I don’t trust THAT GUY. My bullshit meter goes off. I guarantee, people who do not trust end up fucking it up themselves.
Well, no matter what happens on the outside, my job is to make sure that me on the inside stays well. Just good and healthy. Full of trust, gratitude… you know, the good things. Not holding onto negative feeling end experiences. Especially not onto stupid ones like for example coming from a cashier you don’t even know. I am skilled to let them go quickly.
Thats the way I make sure my life goes the way I want. Not the other way around.
I do feel as if I have HUGE AMOUNTS of power and direction over my life… but that’s something for another piece of writing.
I wish you a great and wonderful day,
Fabi.

items.title: Dear Reader
items.content_text:
For such a long time I contain that desire to write. I have just read a piece from a couple months ago expressing that feeling so clearly. It was as if I wrote it just an hour ago. I remember so vividly, going my way through the trees, not far from home, coming closer and feeling that desire to write and publish. What a moment of beauty and presence. What a beautiful moment of indulging in desire.
Now I feel at home.
items.content_html:

What a beautiful moment of indulging in desire.

Now I feel at home.

items.title: Gratitude, pt. 1
items.content_text:
Seemingly out of nowhere came this deep feeling of gratitude over me. Again. I felt it right in the middle of my chest. Right around the area of the 4th chakra.
Gratitude is still one of the best feelings for me. I love and appreciate it so much. it filllllssss me up. It fuels me. It soothes my soul. It gives me deep feeling of connection.
Gratitude is key for a full life. With missing gratitude there is always going to be a blank spot in our lives. Without it, something is going to be missing…
Practice the art of appreciation. Give thanks, even for the small and tiny things. Only if we see, they can be worth so much.
It is very important to understand that first we have to give appreciation… for the things we already have. Not expecting to be given first, and then to show appreciation for it. Thats the totally wrong order.
Gratitude and appreciation is a key element in manifesting long lasting and fulfilling things in our lives. If we send the energy of gratitude and thankfulness, beautiful things are going to manifest in our lives. I promise!
Feeling grateful implies that we got a feeling of fullness. A feeling of richness. This attracts more of the riches that we desire into our lives. That is the art of manifesting.
The art of manifesting. Welcome to the club of magic.
(much more to be said)
Fabi

  • Fabi

items.title: Live And Tell Your Truth
items.content_text:
It is our duty! To live, speak and tell our truth, which we have found. But this in itself requires us to go through a journey.. a journey of self discovery. A discovery of who we are and what we stand for. A really famous and definitely one of my favorite quotes I have ever heard is „a man who won’t stand for something will fall for anything“. And it’s true. Not only for men. It is for everybody. And I really respect people who got that thing, and everyday I make sure that I am one of them as well.
To stand for something gives you power. It gives you a point in life. It gives you YOUR point and power in life!
I am writing FOR people. I am rooting FOR you! For your unique and individual power, strengths, qualities, values, character, and so on… I want to see people strong. Healthy. Free.
I know the sheer power within every single one of us. Many times, I believe in people even more than they believe in themselves. Because I know where I came from. The mental and physical state I have been in. I know how it feels like to be depressed, weak, unworthy, anxious, lost… BUT on the other hand, I know even more how it feels to be strong, healthy, fit, confident, free, HAPPY, grateful, powerful… fulfilled!
I believe that, at least potentially, every person, YOU, got soooooooo much energy inside. You can move things. You can impact. You can create your life beyond any limit.
I wish you a wonderful and powerful day, and a good journey in this life.
Fabi

items.title: Just Another Piece
items.content_text:
God, I feel like I’ve been doing this forever already. Hah! Just a-nother piece (insert singing voice). I’m tired. Which is good. I had a good day. Fuck, it was great to be honest. I ate well, trained hard, connected with people, learned some new things, did what I am supposed to do. I kind of even „broke a record“. Our trainer told us that in many years only 3 people did a rope swing from one section to another, at a certain distance. I took the challenge and did it as well. I felt like I could go even further. Well, was fun. Thank you.
Since the end of 2014 I am continuously writing a diary. I got 5 smaller books filled already. Capturing my days, emotions, situations, thoughts, ideas, whatsoever. Mainly though it is about how I feel, what I think and what i am doing. Where I stand in life. Sometimes, maybe every couple months, I go back through some parts of them. Life never ceases to amaze me. In hindsight I see the way I took. Who I was. Who I’ve become. The areas in which I have grown. My problems, which have resolved or maybe did not.
Fabi

items.title: That Special Place
items.content_text:
I close my eyes. I take a deep breath. I visit again. Here I am. At this special place. I don’t wanna write just like this. I am no academic. Maybe I am. Who even cares. I am someone close to me. To that thing. So close.
Some call it the flow state. Some may even call it trance. Others, including me, like to describe it as full presence. It’s that place where no thinking takes place, just the current. The art. The moment. Creation! That’s where i am coming from. That’s where I go. That’s where I am.
I am no native english speaker. But that language became so dear to me. I apologize for errors. But is there some like that, I wonder? Language is like art, expressing. I came to the conclusion that self expression is so much life. Self expression feels good, is right, it may be even the core of being. So, through language, here I go. Poetically?
SELF EXPRESSION, I read in big letters right here on my desk. I wrote it down quite some time ago, in full conviction. And still, to this day, it’s SO RIGHT. I mean, the good days are filled with self expression. Most of them! Think about it. Those days, when you feel uninhibited, free, self confidently saying what you think, thats great! And I wish everybody could experience more of that, BECAUSE THATS WHO WE ARE AND WHY WE ARE HERE. To self express. Beings, that express themselves freely. I love it! I love to do it as much as I love to see it in others!
The premise for self expression is self esteem. Only if we FEEL worth and appropriate to express ourselves as we are, we can live it. Self esteem might be the topic I studied most extensively in my life, for years, and hundreds of hours. What it is, where it comes from, what it does, how it works, and of course how to increase it. Self esteem is a topic I will dive very very deep into, and there might be a chunk of it in almost every post I publish. I feel like right now I could go on for hours, writing and writing… it’s that special place.
Fabi
